{# Tools only: search, locale, source, theme. No social, no install CTA — those fight the quiet header chrome and the gilded wordmark. #}

{# Right-click the logo mark for brand assets (herdr.dev-style). Outside the header flex so the fixed menu never participates in the nav layout. PNG/WebP are the source raster variants; SVG is a potrace silhouette of the same mark with matching fills. #}
PNG
{{ "logo.download_png" | t }} {{ "logo.download_png_dark" | t }} {{ "logo.download_png_color" | t }}
WebP
